acceptance_criteria.text: Run a keyboard-only/assistive-technology pass over the app's overlays and menus (including the surfaces added by 210/211) and record findings in an audit.
Fix the keyboard/AT gaps found and verify them in the live app.
Add regression coverage and keep the checks green.
A full real-screen-reader (NVDA/VoiceOver) walkthrough of every view and the lesson reader is recorded as the next accessibility pass.
